name: PR fetcher exits zero with a no_data marker when the upstream source returns zero merged PRs in the window
command: mkdir -p fixtures && : > fixtures/prs.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/prs.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'fetched=0' out.txt && grep -q 'status=no_data' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
